case_title: HARVEY W YAW VS. 12 ONE LLC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $325.00 FILED BY YAW, HARVEY W AS TO DEFENDANT 12 ONE LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAW, HARVEY W AS TO DEFENDANT 12 ONE LLC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
